title: Comparative Single-nucleus RNA Profiling of the Heart in Sudden Death with or without Psychiatric Disease versus Non-Sudden Death Controls
author: Li, Liliang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We performed single-nucleus RNA sequencing on cardiac tissues to create a transcriptional atlas at single-cell resolution. This enabled us to compare gene expression profiles between individuals who died suddenly (including subsets with and without psychiatric disorders) and non-sudden death controls.
steps_raw: We performed single-nucleus RNA sequencing on cardiac tissues to create a transcriptional atlas at single-cell resolution. This enabled us to compare gene expression profiles between individuals who died suddenly (including subsets with and without psychiatric disorders) and non-sudden death controls.
